name: DJ Kim tripod My at 0.6 deg
source: DJ Kim et al. (2014) J Geotech Geoenviron Eng
notes: Requires nonlinear pushover with PySimple1/TzSimple1 springs (implemented in v6 standalone, not yet in production builder). Elastic estimate overpredicts because yield is capacity-controlled.

name: K_6x6 condensation self-consistency
notes: Kxx=503.2 MN/m, Krxrx=15202.8 MNm/rad. High coupling (0.88) expected for deep spring profile where stiffness concentrates at skirt tip depth.

name: Seo 2020 full-scale tripod f1
notes: Arany 3-spring + Efthymiou tripod Kr. G_operational=990kPa (1.0MPa). Seo found <2% error with cap+strain correction.

name: Arany Walney 1 f1 (3-spring SSI)
notes: Arany 3-spring EB model with published KL, KR. Arany own prediction: 0.331 Hz (-5.9%).

name: Cheng 2024 scour df/f0 (Sd=0.2D, suction bucket)
notes: Op3 centrifuge power law vs Cheng ABAQUS FE. Both confirm suction buckets are scour-insensitive (<1% frequency change at Sd=0.2D).

name: Kallehave f_meas/f_design (Walney)
source: Kallehave et al. (2015) Phil Trans R Soc A
notes: Op3 Efthymiou stiffness naturally predicts higher f1 than API p-y design, consistent with Kallehave's finding that field-measured frequencies exceed design values.

name: Jeong 2021 permanent rotation (100 cycles)
source: Jeong et al. (2021) Appl Sci / KSCE
notes: Op3 cyclic analysis not yet implemented. Published target for future Mode D cyclic validation. SLS load = 23,500 kNm, DNV limit = 0.25 deg.

name: Jeong 2021 permanent rotation (1M cycles)
source: Jeong et al. (2021) Appl Sci / KSCE
notes: LeBlanc (2010) power law: theta ~ N^0.31. Op3 Mode D with cyclic protocol would test this.
